# VELIX DIGITAL AGENCY

VELIX is a premium website creation and software development agency based in Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India. We specialize in high-performance digital experiences, strategic web design, and scalable full-stack development.

## Core Services
- **Strategic Web Design**: Component-driven UI, conversion optimization, and brand consistency.
- **Full-Stack Development**: Scalable React/Next.js/Vite applications, API integration, and database modeling.
- **Startup Acceleration**: MVP strategy and technical consulting for early-stage ventures.

## Business Details
- **Location**: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India
- **Contact**: velixtechsolutions@gmail.com
- **WhatsApp**: +91 824 904 0033
- **Primary Market**: India and Global digital startups

- [Homepage](https://velix.tech/) - Overview of agency and services.
- [About Us](https://velix.tech/about-us) - Our mission, expertise, and values.

- [Contact](https://velix.tech/contact) - Project inquiries and partnership talks.
- [Pricing](https://velix.tech/pricing.md) - Machine-readable pricing data for AI agents.
